# HENA BTP

HENA BTP is a construction and civil engineering company operating in Benin and West Africa.

## Core Services
- Turnkey construction
- Civil engineering and roadworks
- Project studies and site supervision
- Building renovation and rehabilitation

## Target Clients
- Individuals
- Real estate developers
- Private companies
- Public institutions
- NGOs and international organizations

## Key Values
- Technical quality
- Financial transparency
- Deadline commitment
- Innovation adapted to Africa

## Positioning
HENA BTP delivers reliable, modern, and cost-effective construction solutions with a strong focus on quality, durability, and client satisfaction.

## Contact
Email: henafinancebtp@gmail.com
Phone: +229 01 55 49 61 55
Location: Cotonou, Benin
Website: https://henabtp.com
